display_text: Medusa Aghanim's Scepter: Split Shot now applies on-hit effects to secondary attacks and increases arrow count. This upgrade transforms Medusa into a hyper-efficient multi-target damage dealer, countering high-armor or evasion-heavy lineups by spreading item-based effects like Maelstrom procs or Skadi slows across multiple enemies.
search_text: Medusa Aghanim Scepter Split Shot on-hit effects multi-target damage counter-armor counter-evasion item procs

display_text: Medusa Aghanim's Shard: Cold Blooded automatically retaliates against spellcasters with a single-target Mystic Snake that petrifies them. This is a powerful anti-caster mechanic, punishing aggressive spell usage and disrupting enemy combos by turning initiators into stone mid-engagement.
search_text: Medusa Aghanim Shard Cold Blooded anti-caster spell retaliation petrify counter-initiation
